title: agropyron repens subsp. virescens
intro: Agropyron repens subsp. virescens, also known as creeping bent, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the wheat grass family and is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of Agropyron repens subsp. virescens include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce stress, and promote overall well-being. Traditionally, the plant has been used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to possess a range of medicinal properties when consumed.
